title: UnitedHealth tops quarterly estimates, hikes profit outlook as insurer manages high medical costs
summary_full: The nation's largest private insurer expects 2026 adjusted earnings of more than $18.25 per share, up from a previous outlook of greater than $17.75 per share.
summary_public: The nation's largest private insurer expects 2026 adjusted earnings of more than $18.25 per share, up from a previous outlook of greater than $17.75 per share.
